title: Sarge (disambiguation)
content:
There were several individuals named '''Sarge''':

*'''[[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]]''': a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]]
*'''[[Sarge (clone trooper)|Sarge]]''', a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who served on [[Zeenada]]
*'''[[Sarge (Phaeda)|Sarge]]''', a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Phaeda Militia]]

{{Disambig}}
